Corrected Notice Of Motionf And Moiton For Order Imposing Evidnece Admission Related Issue Relateed And/Or Terminating Sanction Against Defts; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration
Off Calendar Feb-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion For Order Imposing Evidence, Admission-Related, Issue-Related, and/or Terminating Sanctions; or alternatively, Motion For An Order Compelling Responses To Requests For Admissions, Form Interrogatories, Appearance At Deposition, and For Recovery Of Costs is granted as it seeks to have Plaintiff's Requests For Admissions deemed admitted and as it seeks to compel responses to form interrogatories and Defendants' appearance at deposition. No opposition has been filed.
Plaintiff's Request for Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendants are ordered to respond to the form interrogatories within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendants are ordered to appear for their deposition on a date to be noticed by Plaintiff, and to complete that deposition no later than February 27, 2006.
Defendants are ordered to pay Plaintiff's costs in the amount of $670, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Carole Marasovic, Plaintiff/moving party In Propria Persona arrived after hearing.
